heading: Computation of retired pay: law applicable
label: 7329 Computation of retired pay: law applicable
text: A member of the Army retired under this chapter is entitled to retired pay computed under chapter 745 of this title.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3929[No source].[No source].The revised section is based on the various retirement provisions in this chapter and is inserted to make explicit the entitlement to retired pay upon retirement.
Amendments2018—, substituted “chapter 745” for “chapter 371”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 808(b)(12)section 3929 of this title
